About
A little about me

I'm a Bangkok-based data professional currently working in Modern Trade sales operations at R&B Food Supply PCL. Over the past 2+ years, I've handled everything from SAP data entry to building dashboards that the sales team now relies on daily.

My approach is simple — find out what question people actually need answered, then build the clearest possible way to answer it. I self-initiated most of the dashboards in my portfolio without being asked, because I saw the team spending too much time waiting for Excel reports.

I'm looking to move fully into a data analyst role where I can spend more time on analysis, visualization, and helping teams make better decisions with data.

Projects
Selected work
HTML / JavaScript
Modern Trade Sales Analytics Dashboard
Built from scratch outside work hours. A fully interactive dashboard with KPI cards, Year-over-Year comparison, Moving Average forecast, category breakdown, target vs actual tracking, and Dark/Light mode toggle.
Chart.js YoY Analysis Forecasting KPI Tracking Dark Mode
Click any image to enlarge · 6 more views
Looker Studio
Sales KPI & Customer Overview
The dashboard the sales team uses daily. Tracks 1B+ THB in annual sales across 17 key accounts (MAKRO, CJ, Lotus, CP All etc.) and 132 SKUs. Includes monthly YoY bar chart, customer ranking table, and product-level breakdown with filters.
Looker Studio Google Sheets Customer Segmentation Sales KPI
Looker Studio
Daily Sales YoY Comparison Report
Real-time daily sales tracker comparing 2025 vs 2026 performance. Features a gauge meter showing progress vs monthly target, cumulative line chart with shaded gap area, and side-by-side daily tables — built so management can check performance at any point in the month.
Looker Studio YoY Analysis Gauge Chart Daily Tracking
Looker Studio
Daily Order Movement Summary
Heatmap-style order summary table showing upcoming deliveries grouped by customer (MAKRO, Lotus, Big C, The Mall) with color intensity mapped to order volume per delivery date — enabling the warehouse team to plan resources and prioritize shipments proactively.
Looker Studio Heatmap Table Order Tracking Logistics Planning
SAP ERP
SAP Data Extraction & Transformation
Pulled raw data from SAP, cleaned it, and decoded numeric codes into readable product and customer names. This structured dataset became the foundation for all reporting and dashboard work — connecting order data, customer master data, and inventory across teams.
SAP ERP Excel Google Sheets Data Cleaning ETL
